headline: $1000 Invested In Garmin 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
summary: Garmin (NYSE:GRMN) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 1.84% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 14.26%. Currently, Garmin has a market capitalization of $45.46 billion.
